violations.description: Preventing contamination during storage. — --Food item was not properly protected from potential contamination. Open box of Beef Tallow in the dry storage on the bottom rack under shelves that need cleaning.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Equipment that dispenses liquid/food/ice in unpackaged form was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required. Inside top of the ice dispenser needs to be cleaned.--Food contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Dishes on the cook line used for plating food still had previous food debris on them. Inside of multiple reach-in coolers need to be cleaned.--Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Shelving in the kitchen, dry storage, needs to be cleaned. The outside of the dish machine needs cleaned. Portion scales need to be cleaned.
Storage of cleaned equipment and utensils. — --Clean equipment/utensil was not stored in a clean, dry manner to protect from contamination. -Clean clean dish rack by dishwasher.

Plumbing system. — --Plumbing system was not designed, constructed, operated and/or maintained according to regulation. Faucet over the 3 comp sink in the kitchen and in the bar was leaking at the time of inspection.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Floors on the cook line, in the walk-in freezer and in the dry storage need to be cleaned. Entire facility needs the floors, walls, and ceilings need thorough cleaning.
Receptacles, covers/lids, adequate number, clean, insect/rodent proof, storage, frequency, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Clean, employee dressing area, cleaning equipment storage, living/sleeping quarters separate (1 pt deducted)
Proper storage, labeling, use (3 pts deducted)
